diagnostics.message: "onClose" is read only inside `addEventListener` — wrap it with useEffectEvent and remove it from the dep array so the effect doesn't re-synchronize on every parent render

diagnostics.message: "getMenuItems" is read only inside `requestAnimationFrame` — wrap it with useEffectEvent and remove it from the dep array so the effect doesn't re-synchronize on every parent render

diagnostics.help: Wrap the callback with `useEffectEvent(callback)` (React 19+) and call the resulting binding from inside the sub-handler.
